});

const listenHost = String(process.env.FREEAI_BIND_HOST || '127.0.0.1').trim() || '127.0.0.1';
server.listen(port, listenHost, async () => {
  startupComplete = true;
  console.log(`FREE AI server listening on ${listenHost}:${port}`);
  const { DaemonCrawler } = await import('./improvement/daemonCrawler.js');
  const crawler = new DaemonCrawler();
  crawler.start();
});
